title: Four McCarthy Tétrault lawyers honoured as 2024 Lexpert Rising Stars
content:
## Four McCarthy Tétrault lawyers honoured as 2024 Lexpert Rising Stars
Four of our lawyers have been recognized as 2024 Lexpert Rising Stars: Leading Lawyers Under 40 . This prestigious award highlights legal professionals who have demonstrated excellent client service and made meaningful contributions to their communities and the legal profession throughout their careers. Our recognized lawyers are Charles-Antoine Soulière , Jade Buchanan , Alexandra Cocks and Moya Graham , each of whom has shown skill and dedication to their craft and communities.
“This exceptional group of lawyers continues to raise the bar for excellence at McCarthy Tétrault and within the legal community,” said Barbara Boake , Partner and the firm’s National People and Practice Leader. “They are role models for the next generation of lawyers, driving innovative, precedent-setting outcomes for our clients, and demonstrating passionate leadership in both their communities and the legal profession. We are proud of their achievements and this well-deserved recognition.”
Widely recognized as one of Canada’s leading privacy and technology lawyers under 40, Jade stands out by translating complex legal issues into actionable, pragmatic advice. Clients describe Jade as “results-oriented”, “exceptionally responsive” and “down-to-earth”. In addition to being a major part of our Technology Group , Jade has been instrumental in developing our Cyber/Data group . As a member of the board of the Canadian Technology Law Association, Jade gives back to the profession through mentorship, training and co-chairing the Privacy and Cybersecurity Committee. Outside of law, Jade carries on a family tradition of community leadership, with contributions that include volunteering with Vancouver’s School Streets and Adopt-a-Block programs and co-founding traffic safety organization Vision Zero Vancouver.
A partner in our Vancouver Litigation Group , Alexandra is recognized for her leadership in complex commercial litigation, arbitration, and class actions. Advising major corporations and financial institutions across diverse sectors, she is particularly adept at crafting strategic defenses that mitigate risks and resolve disputes efficiently—often avoiding lengthy trials. Her ability to combine legal acumen with a deep understanding of client needs has earned her accolades and trust within the legal community. Alex is also a prominent voice in the industry, contributing to legal publications and speaking on creditor remedies and litigation trends, further solidifying her position as a thought leader. Her commitment to community service, exemplified by her role on the board of a charitable organization focused on youth education, underscores her dedication to making a positive impact beyond her legal practice.
Moya is a partner in our Litigation Group in Toronto. She specializes in complex corporate and commercial disputes. Moya has appeared before all levels of Court including the Supreme Court of Canada. She is a trial lawyer with experience across critical sectors such as technology, infrastructure, and energy. Her industry knowledge and fearless advocacy set her apart. Recognized in top legal directories for her track record of delivering for clients in difficult situations, Moya is lauded for her ability to tackle multifaceted legal challenges and deliver common sense advice in complex scenarios. In the Courtroom, Moya is known for thinking several steps ahead and executing on her strategy. For nearly a decade, Moya has taught a trial advocacy course to second- and third-year law students at Queen’s Law. Her commitment to the profession includes contributions to leading legal publications and number of leadership roles within the Ontario Bar Association, Civil Litigation section. Within our firm, she is someone junior lawyers seek out for mentorship and senior lawyers trust with sensitive issues. Moya’s commitment to excellence and her contributions to the profession highlight her dedication to advancing the legal profession.
As the Québec City Office Lead, Charles-Antoine excels in delivering strategic solutions for clients while cultivating a collaborative and high-performing team culture. His expertise in mergers and acquisitions, securities, corporate finance, and corporate governance positions him as a key advisor to influential players in telecommunications, biotechnology, and natural resources. His ability to navigate complex regulatory landscapes has earned him recognition from clients and peers alike. Additionally, his active role on the firm’s MT❯Ventures Steering Committee demonstrates his commitment to supporting startups, where he provides vital strategic counsel that empowers emerging businesses to thrive. Charles-Antoine’s dual focus on client success and internal collaboration truly sets him apart as a leader dedicated to promoting innovation and growth within the legal landscape.
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information on McCarthy Tétrault or any of the above, please contact media@mccarthy.ca .
